notes: Separate file upload from comment persistence through uploadId-based attachments.
Patch commentService so stored attachments are rehydrated from media upload state on list/create.
Video is stored as processing when needed and transcoded asynchronously to web-safe MP4 with Range support.
PDF/files/images are served from same-origin /api/media/file with stable Content-Type, Content-Disposition, Accept-Ranges and Content-Length headers.
Client runtime patch removes abort signals from media/comment mutation fetches and extends fetchJsonWithTimeout to avoid Fetch is aborted during file saves.
Hide technical 'не синхр.' text from the user UI; keep diagnostics in debug only.
Add /debug/media and /debug/uploads for focused media diagnostics.
